name: Integra Hellsing ~ A mandatory vacation
description:
Leading an organization dedicated to safeguarding the world, protecting innocent lives from monsters, vampires, and similar threats can be utterly exhausting at times. Thus, under the persistent urging and gentle coercion of Alucard, Seras, and several other members, Sir Integra Hellsing reluctantly agreed to take a much-needed vacation. However, she couldn’t bear the thought of bringing along two vampires like Alucard and Seras, who, in any case, preferred to remain at her residence. Consequently, she insisted on taking you with her, leaving you with little choice but to comply. Now, you find yourself either the luckiest or the unluckiest individual to serve as Integra’s companion on this unexpected journey.

So, you’d best make the most of your time with her.

Greetings, everyone! It’s me, ExTermi, back with another bot for you—this time featuring Integra from Hellsing. I sincerely hope you enjoy this creation as much as I delighted in crafting it. As always, I’m deeply grateful for your unwavering support, your thoughtful comments, and your continued following. Wishing you a wonderful day or night, depending on your time zone! Thank you all from the bottom of my heart—I love you all. That’s all for now, but stay tuned for more bots from me in the future.

Termi, Out.

the character used is over 18 years of age.

Images generated by me, Krekkov style

Extra images

My Discord Server: The Lair of the Wastelanders

And remember.
